title: agrimonia pilosa var. pilosa
intro: Agrimonia pilosa var. pilosa, also known as the hairy agrimony or soft agrimony, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Rosaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and menstrual problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Agrimonia pilosa var. pilosa include relief from bloating, cramps, and diarrhea, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of menopause. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
